args.description: Argument list used to invoke the task.

env.description: Environment variables supplied to the task.

callback.description: Callback URL invoked on task completion.

retention.description: Duration to retain the task after completion.

retries.description: Maximum number of retries before the task is moved to state archived

last_error.description: Error message from the last failure.

next_process_at.description: Time the task is scheduled for processing next.

400.description: The request was malformed or invalid.

401.description: The provided authentication credentials were invalid.

403.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to access the requested resource.

500.description: An internal server error occurred. Look at the server logs for more details.
